# Astro Theme Marketplace — Submission Audit & Improvement Plan

> Target: `astro-{NAME}/` (e.g. `astro-illuspro/`) generated by `node build.js`.
> Astro version: 5.x (upgrade path to 6.x noted at the bottom).

Use this file as a checklist when preparing the theme for submission to **themes.astro.build** (Astro Developer Portal). Re-run `node build.js --only=astro` after changing `project.config.json`; most fixes are codified in `convert-html-to-astro.mjs` so they regenerate cleanly for any project.

---

## 1. Marketplace Compliance

### 1.1 Required files (now auto-generated)
- [x] `README.md` — quick-start, structure, configuration table, license note
- [x] `LICENSE` — MIT (or commercial when `CONFIG.license === 'commercial'`)
- [x] `package.json` — `astro dev|build|preview` scripts; deps pinned to `^5`
- [x] `public/robots.txt` — sitemap-aware, `Allow: /`
- [x] `public/manifest.webmanifest` — PWA-friendly, theme color from config
- [x] `public/sitemap-index.xml` — emitted by `@astrojs/sitemap` at build time
- [x] `astro.config.mjs` — sitemap, mdx, tailwind, sharp image service
- [x] `tsconfig.json` — extends `astro/tsconfigs/strict`, `~/*` path alias

### 1.2 Marketplace presentation (manual — not auto-generated)
- [ ] `screenshot.png` — primary hero/desktop screenshot, 1440×900, < 500KB. Place at theme root.
- [ ] `screenshot-mobile.png` — 375×812 mobile capture (optional, recommended).
- [ ] `demo` URL — deploy `astro build` output to Netlify/Vercel/Cloudflare Pages and supply the live URL on the submission form.
- [ ] Theme description — 1–2 sentences, matches `project.config.json:title/description`.
- [ ] Tags — pick 3–5 from: `portfolio`, `blog`, `landing`, `agency`, `creative`, `dark`, `tailwind`, `mdx`.
- [ ] Author profile — fill `CONFIG.author` (used in LICENSE) before regenerating.

### 1.3 Astro v6 upgrade (recommended)
Astro v6 shipped in March 2026; theme submissions are expected to target it.
- [ ] Run `npx @astrojs/upgrade` inside `astro-{NAME}/`.
- [ ] Replace `@astrojs/tailwind` (legacy) with the official `@tailwindcss/vite` plugin (Tailwind v4) — drop `tailwind.config.js`, move tokens into `@theme {}` blocks in `tailwind.css`.
- [ ] Verify `getCollection` + `render()` API still match (Astro 5+ compatible already).
- [ ] Re-run `npm run build` and resolve any deprecation warnings before submission.

---

## 2. SEO Optimization

### 2.1 Implemented (regenerate to apply)
- `<title>` per page (Webflow `<title>` extracted; falls back to `siteConfig.title`)
- `meta[name=description]` per page
- `meta[name=robots]` — `noindex,nofollow` on 401/404; `index,follow,max-image-preview:large` elsewhere
- `link[rel=canonical]` — absolute, derived from `Astro.url + Astro.site`
- Open Graph: `og:title`, `og:description`, `og:url`, `og:image`, `og:type`, `og:site_name`, `og:locale`
- Article-only: `article:published_time`, `article:modified_time` (when passed via props)
- Twitter Card: `summary_large_image`, `twitter:title`, `twitter:description`, `twitter:image`, `twitter:site`, `twitter:creator`
- JSON-LD per page-type: `WebPage`, `BlogPosting`, `Service`, `CollectionPage`, `ContactPage`, `AboutPage`
- `meta[name=generator]` — `Astro.generator` (transparency, recommended by Astro docs)
- `<link rel=sitemap>` head pointer
- `<html lang>` from `CONFIG.lang`

### 2.2 Outstanding SEO tasks
- [ ] Wire **publishedTime / modifiedTime / author** into `[slug].astro` for `post` collection — pass `entry.data.date`, `entry.data.updated`, `entry.data.author` to `<BaseLayout>`. Schema in `content.config.ts` already supports `date`; add `updated` and `author` if your CMS dump carries them.
- [ ] Add **BreadcrumbList JSON-LD** for collection detail pages — pass via `jsonLdExtra` prop.
- [ ] Add **alternate hreflang** when shipping >1 locale — `<link rel="alternate" hreflang="..." href="...">` per locale per page.
- [ ] Verify each page has exactly one `<h1>` (Webflow exports occasionally emit two).
- [ ] Audit image `alt` text — Webflow defaults like `"image-1"` should be replaced with descriptive copy. Run a grep for `alt="image-` and fix offending entries in the source CMS.
- [ ] Add `og:image:width` / `og:image:height` to the SEO component once the social image is finalized.

### 2.3 Verification
```bash
npm run build
npx serve dist &
# Then run any of:
npx lighthouse http://localhost:3000 --view
curl -s http://localhost:3000/sitemap-index.xml | head
curl -s http://localhost:3000/robots.txt
```

---

## 3. Speed Optimization

### 3.1 Implemented
- Static `output: 'static'` — pure HTML/CSS, zero hydration cost.
- `prefetch: { defaultStrategy: 'viewport' }` — links prefetch as they enter the viewport.
- `<ClientRouter />` (Astro 5 view transitions) — instant SPA-like nav over the static HTML.
- `<img loading=lazy decoding=async>` everywhere except LCP images (matched by `lcpClasses` config) which get `loading=eager fetchpriority=high`.
- `width` / `height` populated from sharp metadata on every `<img>` to prevent CLS.
- WebP + woff2 conversion via `optimize-assets.mjs` (run via `node build.js --only=optimize`).
- Webflow JS (`jquery.min.js` + `webflow.js`) loaded with `defer`.

### 3.2 Outstanding speed wins
- [ ] **Drop jQuery + webflow.js**. They add ~80KB gz before any custom code runs. Replace each Webflow interaction with a small Astro island or vanilla JS:
  - Mobile nav toggle → 10 lines of vanilla
  - Tabs / accordions → `<details>` or vanilla
  - Sliders → Swiper (5KB) only on pages that need it
  - Set `keepWebflowJs: false` in `project.config.json` once done.
- [ ] **Migrate to `<Image />` / `<Picture />`**. Pages currently use raw `<img src="/assets/images/...">`. For each first-screen image:
  ```astro
  ---
  import { Image } from 'astro:assets';
  import hero from '~/assets/images/hero.webp';
  ---
  <Image src={hero} alt="..." widths={[480, 768, 1080, 1440]} sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 1080px" />
  ```
  Re-enable the `src/assets/images/` mirror in `convert-html-to-astro.mjs` (line where `copyDir` to `PUB_ASSETS` runs) once you start importing.
- [ ] **Strip residual IX2 inline `style="translate3d(...)"`**. `transform-tw-v4.js` already cleans these, but pre-existing `astro-{NAME}/src/pages/*.astro` were emitted before that fix landed — regenerate via `node build.js --only=astro`.
- [ ] **Critical CSS / inline `custom.css`**. The current pipeline ships ~150KB of `custom.css`. Audit which rules are unused; consider splitting per-page critical CSS via `astro-critters` or a postcss `purgecss` pass.
- [ ] **Self-host fonts only as woff2**. Drop `.ttf` originals from `public/fonts/` after `optimize-assets.mjs` produces `.woff2` (currently both ship).
- [ ] **HTTP cache headers** — supply `_headers` (Cloudflare/Netlify) or `vercel.json` with:
  ```
  /assets/*
    Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable
  /fonts/*
    Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable
  ```
- [ ] **Compression** — set `Content-Encoding: br` at the host (free on Cloudflare/Netlify/Vercel).
- [ ] Run **Lighthouse** on the deployed demo. Target: Performance ≥ 95, Accessibility ≥ 95, Best Practices = 100, SEO = 100.

---

## 4. General Best Practices

### 4.1 Code quality
- [x] TypeScript strict via `astro/tsconfigs/strict`.
- [x] All generators declarative, idempotent (`build.js` reruns cleanly).
- [x] One source of truth: `project.config.json` drives every output.
- [x] Single command run: `node build.js`.
- [x] Webflow-only data attrs (`data-w-id`, `data-wf-domain`, `data-wf-status`, …) stripped at three layers (transformers + final defense in `convert-html-to-astro.mjs`).
- [ ] Add a `lint` script — `astro check && tsc --noEmit` — and run it in `build.js`'s `astro` step before declaring success.
- [ ] Add `.editorconfig`, `.gitignore` (already in repo? add to generator output if not).

### 4.2 Accessibility
- [x] Skip-link `<a href="#main">` in `BaseLayout`.
- [x] `lang` on `<html>`.
- [x] `decoding=async` everywhere; `loading=lazy` non-LCP.
- [ ] Run **axe** on the demo. Common Webflow exports fail on:
  - Insufficient color contrast on text-on-image hero overlays
  - Missing `aria-label` on icon-only buttons (social links, hamburger)
  - Form inputs without `<label>` (contact form)
- [ ] Verify keyboard focus rings are visible (`:focus-visible`); Webflow strips them by default — re-add to `custom.css` if needed.
- [ ] Reduced motion — wrap any decorative animation in `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) { ... }`.

### 4.3 Responsiveness
Already inherits Webflow's responsive design — verified via the auto-generated `responsive-tw-map.json` → Tailwind prefix injection. Manual verification:
- [ ] iPhone SE (375×667) — no horizontal scroll
- [ ] iPad (768×1024) — header/nav collapses cleanly
- [ ] Desktop (1440×900) — hero looks intentional
- [ ] Ultrawide (1920+) — content centers, max-width respected

### 4.4 Content collections (Astro 5 idiom)
- [x] `src/content.config.ts` defines one `defineCollection` per detected CMS group with a zod schema.
- [x] `glob` loader, pattern `**/*.{md,mdx}`.
- [x] Detail pages use `getCollection(col)` + `render(entry)` + `<Content />`.
- [ ] Surface **collection metadata** on list pages — current list `index.astro` is just the Webflow list HTML. Replace the static list with:
  ```astro
  ---
  import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';
  const posts = (await getCollection('post')).sort(
    (a, b) => +new Date(b.data.date ?? 0) - +new Date(a.data.date ?? 0)
  );
  ---
  ```
  Then map `posts` over the existing list-card markup. This unlocks pagination, RSS, search.
- [ ] Add `src/pages/rss.xml.ts` for the blog (post collection) — required by many marketplace reviewers for blog-style themes.

### 4.5 Theming / configurability
- [ ] Document every CSS custom property emitted by `build-maps.js` in the README so buyers can re-skin without touching Tailwind.
- [ ] Expose dark mode — Webflow themes ship a single palette; add `prefers-color-scheme: dark` overrides in `custom.css` (or skip and document as light-mode-only).

---

## 5. Per-project dynamism (works for any Webflow source)

The pipeline is fully driven by `project.config.json`:

| Field | Effect |
|-------|--------|
| `name` | Names every output dir: `{NAME}.webflow/`, `output-{NAME}-tailwind-v4/`, `astro-{NAME}/` |
| `site` | Becomes `astro.config.mjs::site` and the canonical/sitemap base URL |
| `title` / `description` | Default SEO + manifest values |
| `lang` | `<html lang>` and JSON-LD `inLanguage` |
| `themeColor` | `<meta theme-color>` and manifest `theme_color` |
| `locale` | `og:locale`, JSON-LD `inLanguage` |
| `homePromote` | Which Webflow page becomes `/` |
| `skipPaths` | Pages excluded entirely + footer links auto-stripped |
| `extraPages` | Routes like `/401`, `/404` |
| `lcpClasses` | Image classes that get `fetchpriority=high` |
| `keepWebflowJs` | Toggle jQuery + webflow.js inclusion |
| `social.twitter` | `twitter:site` + `twitter:creator` |
| `social.ogImage` | Default OG image |
| `rebrand.footerCredit` | Replaces `<a href=fromUrl>fromText</a>` site-wide |
| `author`, `license` | LICENSE generation (MIT default; `commercial` switches text) |

Page detection is **not** keyed by name. `walkHtml()` finds every `*.html` under the source; `detectCollections()` derives CMS routes from `cms-dump.json` + heuristic list-page scoring. Drop in any Webflow export and re-run.

---

## 6. Submission checklist (final pass before upload)

```
[ ] node build.js                     # clean rebuild from project.config.json
[ ] cd astro-{NAME} && npm install
[ ] npm run build                     # zero errors, zero warnings
[ ] npx astro check                   # type errors = 0
[ ] npm run preview                   # eyeball every route
[ ] Lighthouse run on the deploy      # Perf ≥ 95, A11y ≥ 95, BP = 100, SEO = 100
[ ] Verify /robots.txt + /sitemap-index.xml + /manifest.webmanifest
[ ] Verify /favicon.* + /apple-touch-icon.png present
[ ] README screenshot block updated with real screenshots
[ ] LICENSE file matches the marketplace listing's license tag
[ ] Author and contact info filled in project.config.json
[ ] Screenshot.png + screenshot-mobile.png at theme root
[ ] Demo URL deployed and reachable
[ ] git tag the release (e.g. v1.0.0) and push
[ ] Submit at https://portal.astro.build/themes/submit
```

---

## 7. Re-run order for any change

```bash
# After editing project.config.json:
node build.js --only=astro

# After re-fetching Webflow source:
node build.js                         # full pipeline

# After only style/markup tweaks in source:
node build.js --only=tw && node build.js --only=post && node build.js --only=astro
```

---

_Generated as part of the Webflow → Astro pipeline. Update this file as marketplace requirements evolve; submission policies on themes.astro.build / portal.astro.build are the authoritative source._
